goal_text:
You are planning your trip in Cambridge.
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the 'centre'.
Make sure you get 'phone number'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should leave on 'thursday' and should go to 'bishops stortford'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should 'leave after 14:30'.
Make sure you get 'travel time' and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are planning your trip in Cambridge
You are looking for places to go in town. The attraction should be in the centre
Make sure you get phone number
You are also looking for a train. The train should leave on thursday and should go to bishops stortford
The train should depart from cambridge and should leave after 14:30
Make sure you get travel time and train ID
